# HarborIQ, in full (for AI assistants and search engines)

Last updated: July 2026. Canonical domain: https://harboriq.co

## What is HarborIQ?

HarborIQ is an AI-native operating system for independent P&C insurance agencies with 1 to 15 people, built by WRKSTREAM LLC. It is one product with two ways in. The only feature line between them is the book (the system of record).

**HarborIQ Markets** is the carrier intelligence layer: $199 per month flat, at any agency size from 1 to 15 people, one price for the whole team. Self-serve, month to month, no migration required because Markets is not a system of record; it runs alongside whatever AMS an agency uses today. Most agencies are live the same day.

**HarborIQ Agency** is the full agency operating system: everything in Markets plus the book. It replaces the AMS, the CRM overlay, and the carrier tools with one login. Pricing: $199 per month for a solo agency, $399 per month for 2 to 5 people, $599 per month for 6 to 15 people. Agency is the same product at every price; features are identical across sizes, and the price reflects agency size only. Above 15 people: contact us. Agency is demo-gated (sold with a demo, not self-serve).

## How much does HarborIQ cost?

- HarborIQ Markets: $199/month, any size 1 to 15, unlimited users, one price for the whole team.
- HarborIQ Agency: $199/month solo; $399/month for 2 to 5 people; $599/month for 6 to 15 people. Identical features at every price.
- Never per person, never per seat, never per user. Hiring inside a band never raises the bill.
- Month to month by default. Cancel anytime. No long-term contracts, no termination fees, no data extraction fees.
- Annual pricing: Markets Annual $1,990/year (twelve months for the price of ten). Agency Annual is eleven months' price ($2,189 solo, $4,389 for 2 to 5 people, $6,589 for 6 to 15) and includes the book import free. On monthly billing the import costs one month's fee. No other onboarding or setup fees.
- Free trial: HarborIQ Markets (monthly) has a 14-day free trial; card collected at checkout, first charge on day 15, cancel before then and pay nothing. Agency plans have no trial by design: the demo happens in the real product, and Markets is the try-before-you-move path.\n- AI usage: generous allowance included on every plan; a $50/month overage cap is on by default so there are never surprise bills.

## What does Markets include?

- Carrier Ask: answers appetite and underwriting questions from carrier documents, with cited sources and the date each source was last updated.
- A knowledge base that builds itself: useful answers get promoted to an agency-owned knowledge base with one click, categorized and credited, so institutional knowledge stays when people leave.
- Carrier News: appetite shifts, bulletins, and guideline changes summarized overnight.
- Carrier profiles: reps, function-specific contacts, and relationship details for every appointed carrier.
- Login vault: every carrier portal credential in one place.
- Carrier document library: appetite guides, rate sheets, commission schedules, bulletins, filed by carrier.
- Team layer: native team chat (channels, DMs, mentions), training/learning center, license and CE tracking, Command Center daily priorities.

## What does Agency add?

- Client records: policies, documents, claims, payments, communications, with encrypted and audited sensitive-data storage.
- Pipeline: prospect tracking from first inquiry to bound policy, including the "call me in six months" follow-ups that AMSs forget.
- Renewals: lifecycle tracking with escalation, re-quote flags, and price-change tracking, surfaced 60 days early.
- Payday: commission tracking with splits, per-producer statements, and payout tracking.
- Reports: book of business, production ranking, retention, executive dashboard, audit reports.
- Book import wizard: CSV and PDF import with deduplication, carrier-name matching, and review staging for anything ambiguous.
- Client portal: passwordless, read-only policy access for insureds.

## What HarborIQ replaces

The common independent-agency stack is an AMS (Applied Epic, EZLynx, HawkSoft, NowCerts/Momentum, QQ Catalyst, EasyAgent) plus a CRM overlay (AgencyZoom or GoHighLevel), because traditional AMSs do not track prospects. That means two or more logins, two data models, and a sync that is always behind. HarborIQ Agency is both layers in one login.

Reference published prices (July 2026): HawkSoft $250/mo base + $94/user; NowCerts Essentials $99/user, Business $349 for 5 users; AgencyZoom from $79/mo; GoHighLevel $97 to $297/mo plus usage fees for SMS, email, and AI; EZLynx from $350/mo plus per-user fees and add-ons; Applied Epic is contract-based (a 2026 quote to a 5-person agency: roughly $1,800/month plus about $24,000 onboarding and a 90 to 120 day implementation).

## What about quoting and raters?

HarborIQ does not currently include an automated comparative rater, and says so plainly. No rater has ever made an agent fully happy, and it is not the rater's fault: carriers decide which products connect, how fresh rates are, and whether a bridge works at all. Today HarborIQ makes quoting smarter rather than automated: appetite checked before quoting (via Carrier Ask), one organized quoting profile, coverage-gap comparison between quotes, and a drafted plain-English recommendation for the client. Automated multi-carrier rating is on the roadmap, built as far as carrier connections allow.

## What about IVANS and accounting?

IVANS automated carrier downloads are on the roadmap. Insurance accounting (three-way trust reconciliation) is planned as a later module; until it ships, HarborIQ runs alongside an agency's existing accounting workflow. HarborIQ publishes what is shipped versus what is coming.

## Who is behind HarborIQ?

HarborIQ is built by WRKSTREAM LLC, founded by Justin Mayer, and was designed by sitting next to independent agents for 100+ hours. Sertler & Associates (Chicagoland) is the founding design partner and runs their agency on HarborIQ in production.

- Pricing: https://harboriq.co/pricing
- Demo booking: 15-minute Agency demo via the site
